description: Deep diagnostics for a single MySQL server, InnoDB, exporter, host and logs.

panels.description: Runtime Performance Schema state; standalone intentionally has no GR role.

panels.title: Statement Latency
panels.description: Average statement latency from Performance Schema summaries.

panels.title: Rows Examined / Query
panels.description: Rows examined per statement; rising values indicate plan or index regressions.

panels.title: Top Statement Latency
panels.description: Digest collector is capped at 50 rows and 120 characters.

panels.title: Buffer Pool Waits
panels.description: Any sustained wait_free rate indicates buffer flushing cannot keep up.

panels.title: Lock Wait Time Rate
panels.description: Aggregate lock-wait seconds per wall second; it can exceed one with concurrent waiters.

panels.title: History List Length
panels.description: A continuously growing history list usually means a long transaction blocks purge.

panels.title: Certification / Applier Queue
panels.description: No data is expected for standalone.

panels.title: Flow-control Pressure
panels.description: Queue depth divided by the configured flow-control threshold.

panels.title: MySQL Logs
panels.description: Server error and exporter service logs from the existing node syslog stream; the slow-query file remains local-only.

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:$ip (unit:in("mysql","mysqld","mysqld_exporter") OR app:$ins) | fields level,app,unit,_msg

panels.title: Router / Backup Logs
panels.description: Router and controlled backup/restore stage messages.

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:$ip (unit:in("mysqlrouter","mysql-backup") OR app:~"mysql-backup-.*") | fields level,app,unit,_msg

title: MySQL Instance
